title: Blue Hydrogen and CCS Integration with Route Builders
caption: Parameter study for blue-H2 capture fraction and CCS export load.
description: The blue-H2 study sweeps target CO2 capture fraction and tracks residual carbon intensity, CO2 export load, and compression duty index.
discussion: Higher capture targets reduce residual carbon intensity but increase CO2 export and compression demand. This is the central blue-H2 trade-off: the capture target must be selected with the CCS chain, power balance, and product specification visible in the same notebook.
calculation_basis: Stoichiometric SMR/ATR/POX/WGS balances, equilibrium or route-builder sweeps, PSA recovery accounting, and CO2-capture mass-balance indices.
study_basis: IEA hydrogen route context plus process-design and gas-purification references set the screening ranges and interpretation limits.
source_labels: IEA Global Hydrogen Review 2023, Chemical engineering design reference, Gas purification reference, GPSA engineering data reference

topic_examples.topic: Steam methane reforming with carbon capture
topic_examples.calculation: Run a BlueHydrogenPlantBuilder capture-fraction sweep for SMR plus WGS, selective CO2 capture, PSA, and export compression.
topic_examples.sweep: Capture target 70-98 percent at fixed methane feed, steam-to-carbon ratio, and CO2 export pressure.
topic_examples.kpis: Hydrogen product rate, residual kg CO2/kg H2, captured CO2 export rate, CO2 compression-duty index.
topic_examples.source_labels: IEA Global Hydrogen Review 2023, Gas purification reference, Chemical engineering design reference

topic_examples.calculation: Compare amine, physical-solvent, membrane, adsorption, and cryogenic capture as screening factors around ComponentCaptureUnit.
topic_examples.sweep: Capture option and target capture fraction with technology-specific energy and product-pressure factors.
topic_examples.kpis: Capture rate, hydrogen loss, CO2 purity, energy-penalty index, export-compression index.
topic_examples.source_labels: Gas purification reference, IEA Global Hydrogen Review 2023, Chemical engineering design reference

topic_examples.calculation: Pass captured CO2 to export compression, pipeline pressure checks, and injection-envelope screening.
topic_examples.sweep: CO2 export pressure, impurity margin, dehydration specification, and pipeline/injection pressure level.
topic_examples.kpis: Dense-phase margin, compressor power, water-removal flag, injection-pressure acceptance, storage handoff pressure.
topic_examples.source_labels: Gas transmission and processing reference, GPSA engineering data reference, IEA Global Hydrogen Review 2023
